properties.mapping MedicationAdministration_Respons:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Systemic therapy breast response (RECIST)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Systemic therapy breast response (RECIST)" AS originalValue,
		'MedicationAdministration_Response1' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "MedicationAdministration_Response1" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE

SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Systemic therapy axillar response (RECIST)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Systemic therapy axillar response (RECIST)" AS originalValue,
		'MedicationAdministration_Response2' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "MedicationAdministration_Response2" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity: TumorMarkerTest1 (HER2):
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" || '_test_1' as Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS primarycanceridentifier,
		'Laboratory' AS categoryoriginal,
		"TumorMarkerTest1_Category" AS categoryeucaim,
		'HER2' AS tumormarkeroriginal,
		"TumorMarkerTest1_Code" AS tumormarkereucaim,
		"TumorMarkerTest1_ResultValueAsConcept" AS valueasconcept,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping SurgicalProcedure_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Surgery type' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Surgery type" AS originalValue,
		'SurgicalProcedure_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "SurgicalProcedure_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping MedicationAdministration_Code:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Systemic therapy drug' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Systemic therapy drug" AS originalValue,
		'MedicationAdministration_Code' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "MedicationAdministration_Code" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp

properties.entity:Patient:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Population" AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Patient_DiagnosticCategory" AS DiagnosticCategoryEucaim,
		"Patient sex" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		"Patient_ManagingOrganization" AS ManagingOrganization,
		CASE
        	WHEN "Patient_Deceased" = 'yes' THEN '0'
        	WHEN "Patient_Deceased" = 'no'  THEN '1'
        ELSE NULL
    	END AS deceased,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.entity: Procedure2 (PET-CT):
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Procedure2_Identifier" AS ProcedureIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Procedure2_Code" AS	imagingprocedureeucaim,
        'PET-CT' AS imagingprocedureoriginal,
		"Procedure2_OffsetUnit" AS offsetuniteucaim,
		'day' AS offsetunitoriginal,
		"Procedure2_OffsetFromDiagnosis" AS offsetfromdiagnosis,
		"Procedure2_ImagingTimepoint" AS ImagingTimepoint,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Patient sex' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Patient sex" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,

SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,

properties.entity: Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"Tumor location.Topography" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Topography" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Code" AS primarycancerconditioneucaim,
		"Cancer type" AS primarycancerconditionoriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehavior" AS histologymorphologybehavioureucaim,
		"Tumor histology" AS histologymorphologybehaviouroriginal,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

properties.entity:Tumor:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" || '_tumor_1' as Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Tumor location.BodySite.Code" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySite_Code" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		'day' AS OffsetUnitOriginal,
		"Tumor location.BodySite.LocationQualifier" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierOriginal,
		"Tumor_BodySite_LocationQualifier" AS BodySiteLocationQualifierEUCAIM,
		"Tumor_BodySite_LateralityQualifier" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierEUCAIM,
		"Tumor location.BodySite.LateralityQualifier" AS BodySiteLateralityQualifierOriginal,
		"Tumor_SizeDimensionUnit" AS sizeDimensionUnit,
		CASE
        	WHEN "Tumor_SizeMaximumDimension" = '?' THEN NULL
        ELSE "Tumor_SizeMaximumDimension"
		END AS sizeMaximumDimension,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

properties.entity: Procedure1 (Biopsy):
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Procedure1_Identifier" AS TreatmentIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
        'Biopsy' AS procedureoriginal,
		"Procedure1_Code" AS procedureeucaim,
		"Procedure1_OffsetUnit" AS offsetuniteucaim,
		'day' AS offsetunitoriginal,
		CASE
        	WHEN "Procedure1_OffsetFromDiagnosis" = '?' THEN NULL
        ELSE CAST("Procedure1_OffsetFromDiagnosis" AS DECIMAL(5,2))
		END AS offsetfromdiagnosis,
		'0' AS Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 03 for clinical data (SAS breast dataset):
* Clinical data input normalized and curated is loaded and converted to a relational model.
* Specific mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
Steps:
1. Read normalized and curated csv file and apply structural mapping preparation
2. Apply lookups for coded values
3. Write values transformed to EUCAIM CDM and hyperontology to ingestion database

controllerServices.name: LookupTumorMarkerTest4ResultValueAsConcept
controllerServices.comments: This lookups are created separately to differentiate what positive and negative values could mean in each one of the tumor marker tests
